---
title: "Simplify polygons"
---

## Prerequisites

```{r include=FALSE}
library(here)
library(dplyr)
library(geojp)
library(sf)
library(tmap)   # map making package
tmap_mode("plot")
library(pdftools)
library(magick)
library(grid)   # to re-arrange maps
library(gridExtra)
```

## Read data

```{r}
# N03_small <- sf::read_sf("shp/N03_small.geojson")
N03_small <- sf::read_sf(here::here("data","N03_small_nori.geojson"))
N03_okinawa_amami <- sf::read_sf(here::here("data","N03_okinawa_amami.geojson"))

A38 <- sf::read_sf(here::here("data","A38_small.geojson"))
# A38 <- sf::read_sf(here::here("data","A38_small_nori.geojson"))
A38_noncentre <- dplyr::filter(A38, 
                      A38b_003 == 102 |
                      A38b_003 == 103 |
                      A38b_003 == 106 |
                      A38b_003 == 108 |
                      A38b_003 == 114 |
                      A38b_003 == 115 |
                      A38b_003 == 116 |
                      A38b_003 == 1313 |
                      A38b_003 == 1704 |
                      A38b_003 == 1802 |
                      A38b_003 == 1803 |
                      A38b_003 == 1903 |
                      A38b_003 == 2311 |
                      A38b_003 == 2507 |
                      A38b_003 == 2902 |
                      A38b_003 == 2905 |
                      A38b_003 == 4102 |
                      A38b_003 == 4506  )
#A38_noncentre <- sf::read_sf(here::here("data","A38_2020_nocentre.shp"))
MCD <- sf::read_sf(here::here("data","MCD.csv", 
        options = c("X_POSSIBLE_NAMES=X", "Y_POSSIBLE_NAMES=Y"), 
        crs = 6668))
MCD$Type <- ifelse(MCD$Type == 2, 1, MCD$Type)
MCD$Type <- factor(MCD$Type, levels = c(1,3,4), labels=c("Core","Regional","Affiliated"))
sfLabel <- sf::read_sf(here::here("data","label_SHA.geojson"))
```

## Ratio calculation

```{r}
jp_range = st_bbox(N03_small)["ymax"] - st_bbox(N03_small)["ymin"]
okinawa_range = st_bbox(N03_okinawa_amami)["ymax"] - st_bbox(N03_okinawa_amami)["ymin"]
jp_okinawa_ratio = okinawa_range / jp_range
```

## Functions

```{r}
create_jp_map <- function(title = "", 
                          sf, 
                          sf_title = "", 
                          sf_col = "#ffcccc",
                          sf_fill = "#ffcccc"){
  jp_map <- tm_graticules(labels.size = 0.4) +
    tm_shape(N03_small) +
    tm_polygons(col = "grey",
              fill = "white",
              lwd = 0.1)
  if (length(sf_fill) == 1){
    jp_map <- jp_map + tm_shape(sf) +
    tm_polygons(
                fill = sf_fill,
                col = sf_col,
                lwd = 0) + 
    tm_add_legend(type = "polygons", 
            fill = sf_fill,
            col = sf_col,
            alpha = 1,
            lwd = 0,
            title = sf_title)
  } else{
    print("Multiple fill")
    jp_map <- jp_map + tm_shape(sf) +
      tm_polygons(fill = "Snowfall",
                fill.scale = tm_scale(values = sf_fill),
                fill_alpha = 0.5,
                col = sf_col,
                lwd = 0.1)
  }
    jp_map <- jp_map + tm_shape(MCD) + 
    tm_symbols(fill = "Type",
               fill.scale = tm_scale(values = c("#e853b2", "#2e33a6", "#459a64") ),
               col = "white",
               size = 0.2,
               lwd = 0.1,
               fill.legend = tm_legend(title = "Medical Centres for Dementia")) +
    tm_shape(A38_noncentre) +
    tm_borders(col = "red", lwd = 1) + 
    tm_add_legend(type = "borders", 
            col = "red",
            lwd = 1,
            title = "SHA with no MCD") +
    tm_shape(sfLabel) +
    tm_text(text = "SHA_name",
            size = 0.4,
            bgcol = "white",       # Background color
            bgcol_alpha = 0.8) +   # Must be > 0 to see it
    tm_scalebar(text.size = 0.6,
                position = c("center", "bottom")) + 
    # tm_compass(type = "4star", position = c("right", "center")) +
    tm_title(title) +
    tm_layout(legend.position = c("left","top"),
              legend.bg.color = "white",
              legend.title.size = 0.8,
              legend.text.size = 0.8,
              frame = FALSE)
  return(jp_map)
}
```

```{r}
create_okinawa_map <- function(sf = NULL,
                               sf_col = "#ffcccc",
                          sf_fill = "#ffcccc"){
  okinawa_map <- tm_shape(N03_okinawa_amami) +
    tm_polygons(col = "grey",
              fill = "white",
              lwd = 0.1)
  if (!is.null(sf)){
    print("sf is not null")
    okinawa_map <- okinawa_map + tm_shape(sf) +
    tm_polygons(col = sf_col,
                fill = sf_fill,
                lwd = 0)
  }
  okinawa_map <- okinawa_map + tm_shape(MCD) + 
    tm_symbols(fill = "Type",
               fill.scale = tm_scale(values = c("#e853b2", "#2e33a6", "#459a64")),
               col = "white",
               size = 0.2,
               lwd = 0.1,
               fill.legend = tm_legend(show = FALSE)) +
    tm_title("Okinawa and Amami") +
    tm_layout(
              frame = TRUE, bg.color = "white", 
              title.size = 0.8,
              title.position = c("left", "top"))
  return(okinawa_map)
}
```

```{r}
save_pdf <- function(jp_map,
                     okinawa_map,
                     filename){
  pdf(filename)
  grid.newpage()
  pushViewport(viewport(layout = grid.layout(1, 1,
                          heights = unit(c(jp_okinawa_ratio, 1), "null"))))
  print(jp_map, vp = viewport(layout.pos.row = 1))
  
  print(okinawa_map, vp = viewport(x = 0.80, y = 0.2,
                          height = jp_okinawa_ratio / sum(c(jp_okinawa_ratio, 1))))
  dev.off()
}
```

## Snowfall

```{r}
A22 <- sf::read_sf(here::here("data","A22_small.geojson"))
A22$Snowfall <- factor(A22$A22_009,
                        levels = c("1","2"),
                        labels = c("Heavy","Extremely Heavy"))
```

```{r}
jp_map <- create_jp_map(title = "A: Snowfall", 
                        A22, 
                        "Snowfall",
                        "#666666",
                        c("#8da5ed","#1a2a7f"))
```
```{r}
okinawa_map <- create_okinawa_map()
```

```{r}
save_pdf(jp_map,okinawa_map,here::here("output","Base_Snowfall.pdf")
```

## Mountainous

```{r}
A24 <- sf::read_sf(here::here("data","A24_small.geojson"))
```

```{r}
jp_map <- create_jp_map(title = "B: Mountainous", 
                        A24, 
                        "Mountainous",
                        "#e59866",
                        "#e59866")
```

```{r}
okinawa_map <- create_okinawa_map()
```

```{r}
save_pdf(jp_map,okinawa_map,here::here("output","Base_Mountainous.pdf")
```

## Agricultural

```{r}
A25 <- sf::read_sf(here::here("data","A25_small.geojson"))
A25_okinawa_amami <- sf::read_sf(here::here("data","A25_okinawa_amami.geojson"))
```

```{r}
jp_map <- create_jp_map(title = "C: Agricultural", 
                        A25, 
                        "Agricultural",
                        "#82e0aa",
                        "#82e0aa")
```

```{r}
okinawa_map <- create_okinawa_map(A25_okinawa_amami,"#82e0aa","#82e0aa")
```
```{r}
save_pdf(jp_map,okinawa_map, here::here("output","Base_Agricultural.pdf"))
```

## Peninsula

```{r}
A18 <- sf::read_sf(here::here("data","A18_small.geojson"))
```

```{r}
jp_map <- create_jp_map(title = "D: Peninsulas", 
                        A18, 
                        "Peninsula",
                        "#d896ff",
                        "#d896ff")
```

```{r}
okinawa_map <- create_okinawa_map()
```

```{r}
save_pdf(jp_map,okinawa_map, here::here("output","Base_Peninsula.pdf"))
```

## Remote Islands

```{r}
dfRI <- sf::read_sf(here::here("data","rito.csv"))
# dfRI$code_pref_muni <- as.integer(dfRI$code_pref_muni)
```

```{r}
sfRI_small <- dplyr::right_join(N03_small, dfRI,  
        by = dplyr::join_by(N03_007 == code_pref_muni))
sfRI_okinawa_amami <- dplyr::right_join(N03_okinawa_amami, dfRI,  
        by = dplyr::join_by(N03_007 == code_pref_muni))
```

```{r}
jp_map <- create_jp_map(title = "E: Municipalities with remote islands", 
                        sfRI_small, 
                        "Municipalities with Remote islands",
                        "#66cccc",
                        "#66cccc")
```

```{r}
okinawa_map <- create_okinawa_map(
                        sfRI_okinawa_amami, 
                        "#66cccc",
                        "#66cccc")
```

```{r}
save_pdf(jp_map,okinawa_map,here::here("output","Base_RI.pdf"))
```

## Arrange

```{r}
library(pdftools)
library(magick)
library(grid)
library(gridExtra)

dpi <- 300

# Example: Read each PDF as image
img1 <- image_read(pdf_render_page(here::here("output","Base_Snowfall.pdf"), page = 1, dpi = dpi))
img2 <- image_read(pdf_render_page(here::here("output","Base_Mountainous.pdf"), page = 1, dpi = dpi))
img3 <- image_read(pdf_render_page(here::here("output","Base_Agricultural.pdf"), page = 1, dpi = dpi))
img4 <- image_read(pdf_render_page(here::here("output","Base_Peninsula.pdf"), page = 1, dpi = dpi))
img5 <- image_read(pdf_render_page(here::here("output","Base_RI.pdf"), page = 1, dpi = dpi))
# Repeat for all five maps

# Convert magick images to grobs for grid.arrange()
g1 <- rasterGrob(img1)
g2 <- rasterGrob(img2)
g3 <- rasterGrob(img3)
g4 <- rasterGrob(img4)
g5 <- rasterGrob(img5)
# etc.

# Arrange and save
pdf(here::here("output", "Base_maps.pdf"), width = 12, height = 10)
grid.arrange(g1, g2, g3, g4, g5, ncol = 3)
dev.off()
```
